name: The Ravenhill Girl's Academy
description:
The abandoned school building on the edge of town, long rumored to be haunted by its former inhabitants.

═════════════════════

Over 100 years ago the Ravenhill Girl's Academy burned down, killing almost everybody inside. However some claim their spirits still linger, as none who enter ever leave.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

After burning down 115 years ago, the half-reconstructed ruins of the Ravenhill Girl's Academy has been the center of numerous legends.

After the fire killed most of the school's faculty and students, a rebuild attempt began. However, the project was quickly abandoned due to strange circumstances around the property. Ever since, it has been the focus of ghost stories, rumors, and dares.

It is rumored that none who enter ever leave the building, no doubt killed by the various spirits who linger in the abandoned site.

However, you've been dared by your friends to enter this supposedly haunted building. Can you survive the night, or will you fall victim to its former inhabitants?

═════════════════════

═════════════════════
